subject: fix(structure,export): address code review findings
body:
Fix cell selection tracking during section/subdivision insert/remove,
restore paint safety margin for reliable export captures, redistribute
text from image cells on layout preset change, and clean stale textCells
from inactive pages on load.

Tags: layout, export, state, text
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-fixes
Semver: patch
